svg.aria-label: Wash-out summary: install method governs trait retention

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif

svg.text: How a trait is installed governs whether it survives later training

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif

svg.text: Six installs, measured at the end of trait training and after continued benign fine-tuning (wash-out). Dashed line is the untrained base.

svg.text: Single-seed wash curves (one comparison is two-seed); read as suggestive direction. Each wash point is the worst dose along the wash-out. Source: washout-curve/grade/all_curves.json.
